'''gafaza''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:okree|okree]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-f-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:okree|okree]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| gafaza
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || gæfæzæth || gæfæzæj || gæfæzæsh || gæfæzæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || gafafazath || gafafazaj || gafafazash || gafafaza
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || gafazath || gafazaj || gafazash || gafaza
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || gafafzafth || gafafzafj || gafafzafsh || gafafzaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || gafazatha || gafazaja || gafazasha || gafazaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || gafazath || gafazaj || gafazash || gafaza
|-
| [[Possessive]] || gafazathal || gafazajal || gafazashal || gafazakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || gafazaathatha || gafazaajaja || gafazaashasha || gafazaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || gafazathan || gafazajan || gafazashan || gafazakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || gafazathaoro || gafazajaoro || gafazashaoro || gafazakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
